请你从数组 `nums` 的所有三段式子数组中找出和最大的那个，并返回其 **最大** 和。

 

**示例 1：**

**输入：**nums = [0,-2,-1,-3,0,2,-1]

**输出：**-4

- `nums[l...p] = nums[1...2] = [-2, -1]` 严格递增 (`-2 < -1`)。

- 和 = `(-2) + (-1) + (-3) + 0 + 2 = -4`。

**示例 2:**

**输入:** nums = [1,4,2,7]

**输出:** 14

def solve(nums)
    n = nums.length
    left_incr = Array.new(n) { 0 }
    left_incr[0] = 0
    for i in 1..n-1
        if nums[i] > nums[i-1]
            left_incr[i] = left_incr[i-1]
        else
            left_incr[i] = i
        end
    end

    right_decr = Array.new(n) { 0 }
    right_decr[n-1] = n-1
    for i in (n-2).downto(0)
        if nums[i] > nums[i+1]
            right_decr[i] = right_decr[i+1]
        else
            right_decr[i] = i
        end
    end

    right_incr = Array.new(n) { 0 }
    right_incr[n-1] = n-1
    for i in (n-2).downto(0)
        if nums[i] < nums[i+1]
            right_incr[i] = right_incr[i+1]
        else
            right_incr[i] = i
        end
    end

    prefix = Array.new(n+1, 0)
    for i in 0..n-1
        prefix[i+1] = prefix[i] + nums[i]
    end

    max_sum = -Float::INFINITY

    for p in 0..n-1
        l = left_incr[p]
        if l >= p
            next
        end
        q = right_decr[p]
        if q < p + 1
            next
        end
        r = right_incr[q]
        if r < q + 1
            next
        end
        current_sum = prefix[r+1] - prefix[l]
        max_sum = [max_sum, current_sum].max
    end

    max_sum
end
